mission.title: crossplane: Add Combine{From,To}Composite patch types
mission.description:
### Description of your changes

This PR implements "multiple source patches" as a new pair of patch types, where multiple source values from the same resource can be combined into a single destination field. These patches take a new `combine` struct as input, allowing for expansion of the functionality in future.

These patches currently do not apply if any of the given variables are not found (whether this returns an error depends on configured patching policy).

Note: Added the reverse patch

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:

This PR implements "multiple source patches" as a new pair of patch types, where multiple source values from the same resource can be combined into a single destinatio

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: CompositeResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: nops.nopresource.crossplane.dev
spec:
  defaultCompositionRef:
    name: nop-resource
  group: nopresource.crossplane.dev
  names:
    categories:
      - crossplane
      - wrapper
      - nop
    kind: Nop
    plural: nops
  versions:
    - additionalPrinterColumns: []
      name: v1alpha1
      referenceable: true
      served: true
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
      
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/vshn/crossplane-service-broker/pull/43. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
[![WhiteSource Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/crossplane/crossplane](https://togithub.com/crossplane/crossplane) | require | minor | `v1.1.1` -> `v1.3.0` |

---

### [`v1.3.0`](https://togithub.com/crossplane/crossplane/releases/v1.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/crossplane/crossplane/compare/v1.2.3...v1.3.0)

#### Major Themes

The v1.3.0 release introduces a hotly awaited Composition feature - https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/2352 adds new `CombineFromComposite` and `CombineToComposite` patch types that can be used to patch from multiple Composite Resource (XR) fields to a single composed resource field, and vice versa.

#### Notable Updates

-   https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/2349 - Marks the v1beta1 pkg.crossplane.io and apiextensions.pkg.crossplane.io API groups as deprecated.
-   https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/2311 - Removes support for the OAM Crossplane extension. We recommend using Crossplane with [KubeVela](https://kubevela.io/) instead.
-   https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/2352 - Adds new `CombineFromComposite` and `CombineToComposite` composition patch types.
-   https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/2180 - XRs now continue the reconcile process when they enco
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: CompositeResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: nops.nopresource.crossplane.dev
spec:
  defaultCompositionRef:
    name: nop-resource
  group: nopresource.crossplane.dev
  names:
    categories:
      - crossplane
      - wrapper
      - nop
    kind: Nop
    plural: nops
  versions:
    - additionalPrinterColumns: []
      name: v1alpha1
      referenceable: true
      served: true
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:

apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: CompositeResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: nops.nopresource.crossplane.dev
spec:
  defaultCompositionRef:
    name: nop-resource
  group: nopresource.crossplane.dev
  names:
    categories:
      - crossplane
      - wrapper
      - nop
    kind: Nop
    plural: nops
  versions:
    - additionalPrinterColumns: []
      name: v1alpha1
      referenceable: true
      served: true
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
          properties:
            spec:
              description: A NopSpec defines the configuration of a Nop.
              properties:
                parameters:
                  type: object
                  description: >
                    NopParameters are the configurable fields of
                    a Nop.
                  properties:
                    nop:
                      description: A nop is a nop.
                      type: string
                      default: nop
                      enum:
                        - nop
                        - pon
              required:
                - parameters
              type: object
            status:
              description: A NopStatus defines the status of a Nop.
              properties:
                nop:
                  description: Either a nop or a pon.
                  type: string
              type: object

apiVersion: apiextensions.crossplane.io/v1
kind: Composition
metadata:
  labels:
    provider: nop
    purpose: provides-nop
  name: nop-resource 
spec:
  compositeTypeRef:
    apiVersion: nopresource.crossplane.dev/v1alpha1
    kind: Nop
  resources:
    - name: Nop1
      base:
        apiVersion: nop.crossplane.io/v1alpha1
        kind: NopResource
        metadata:
          name: nop1
          labels:
            purpose: provides-nop
        spec:
          forProvider:
            conditionAfter:
              - conditionType: "Ready"
                conditionStatus: "False"
                time: "5s"
              - conditionType: "Ready"
                conditionStatus: "True"
                time: "10s"
              - conditionType: "Synced"
                conditionStatus: "False"
                time: "30s"
              - conditionType: "Synced"
                conditionStatus: "True"
                time: "120s"

      patches:
        - type: CombineFromComposite
          combine:
            variables:
              - fromFieldPath: spec.parameters.nop
              - fromFieldPath: metadata.uid
            strategy: String
            string:
              fmt: "fromcomposite-%s-%s"
          toFieldPath: metadata.labels['nop']

        - type: CombineToComposite
          combine:
            variables:
              - fromFieldPath: metadata.name
              - fromFieldPath: metadata.labels["crossplane.io/composite"]
            strategy: String
            string:
              fmt: "tocomposite-%s-%s"
          toFieldPath: status.nop
          transforms:
            - type: string
              string:
                fmt: "%s-transform-value"

# If both patches work right, the composed 
# resource should have a `nop` label containing
# fromcomposite-<nopvalue>-<uid>
# and the composite resource should have a
# `nop` status containing 
# `tocomposite-<composed-name>-<composite-name>-transform-value

apiVersion: nopresource.crossplane.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Nop
metadata:
  name: its-a-nop
spec:
  parameters:
    nop: pon

apiVersion: nop.crossplane.io/v1alpha1
kind: NopResource
metadata:
  labels:
    crossplane.io/composite: its-a-nop
    nop: fromcomposite-pon-9e67f5f3-b2d1-40d9-8ade-c3b22ee0c30f # Patched from composite
    purpose: provides-nop
  name: its-a-nop-q8jht
  uid: 8ac941ae-935f-4fe4-b37e-63627c2a3dea
spec: {}
status:
  atProvider: {}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible.
